chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Civil Revision Appln No.79 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / priority 1. For orders on office objection No.1 a/w reply as at A. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4203/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Nabeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the applicant. Ms. Pia Ali, Advocate for respondent No.2. ------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this civil revision application. The same is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application subject to all its legal consequences. J U D G E Asif
